ground_truth.title: Gaming Literacy: How to Understand Video Games
ground_truth.author: Przemek Zieliński
with: Gaming Literacy: How to Understand Video Games is the first of a four-part series called 'Do You Speak Video Games?'
Billions of us play games, leaving even the snobbiest and most luddite to admit it's no longer a medium that can be glossed over.
Przemek Zieliński offers Culture.pl readers a model based on language-learning that can broaden how we think about video games.
The series aims to broaden how we think about video games and our interactions with them.
This article appears on Culture.pl, a platform focused on cultural discourse.
